## CLE3 Checks

- [ ] I checked `AGENTS.md` for the relevant phase.
- [ ] For panel work, I ran or reviewed `node scripts/run-panel-jobs.js --episode EPxxx --dry-run --max-jobs 3`.
- [ ] For panel assets, I followed `docs/ASSET-STORAGE-POLICY.md`.
- [ ] I ran `node scripts/check-panel-assets.js` when adding or changing panel assets.
- [ ] I did not commit original, candidate, rejected, or base image files.
